Presence of Issues in the Code\n**Confirmed:**  \n- The code is a standard autogenerated stub, with no malicious or suspicious content.\n- No data input/output, no data flows, no sinks, no runtime logic.\n- The source map is typical for transpiled or generated code, embedded as a base64 string.\n\n**No issues detected in the code itself.**\n\n---\n\n### 2. While they state it's typical, a deeper inspection of the source map content could confirm or deny any hidden anomalies. However, given the context, such embedded source maps are standard and not malicious.\n\n**Conclusion:**  \n- The reasoning is sound and consistent with the code content. No logical flaws are evident.\n\n---\n\n### 3.
